patches_modified.name: Enable Peak membership
patches_modified.description: Enables some app features locked behind the subscription paywall. Not all premium functionality is available.

patches_modified.name: Add notification shortcut
patches_modified.description: Adds a notification shortcut button above quick write in the post list.

patches_modified.name: Add settings
patches_modified.description: Adds a Morphe settings entry to the DCInside settings screen.

patches_modified.name: Add settings resources
patches_modified.description: Adds Morphe settings resources to the app.

patches_modified.name: Adjust image download menu
patches_modified.description: Moves the image download menu buttons upward by adding bottom padding.

patches_modified.name: Bypass getText
patches_modified.description: Bypasses the integrity check for getText.

patches_modified.name: Change package name
patches_modified.description: Appends ".revanced" to the package name by default. For DCinside only

patches_modified.name: Custom branding
patches_modified.description: Customize app branding (name and icon)

patches_modified.name: Dimens Patch
patches_modified.description: reassigns ad_minimum_height to 0dp to remove ads from the app.

patches_modified.name: Disable Comment Ad
patches_modified.description: Disables the comment ad in the app.

patches_modified.name: Disable DCCon loading
patches_modified.description: Adds settings to block DCCon image loading in posts and replies.

patches_modified.name: Disable Image Ad
patches_modified.description: Disables the image ad in the app.

patches_modified.name: Disable ad controller
patches_modified.description: Disables the ad controller that manages ads in the app.

patches_modified.name: Disable update check
patches_modified.description: Disables the app's update check.

patches_modified.name: Enable OneStore feature
patches_modified.description: Enables the OneStore feature in DC Inside app.

patches_modified.name: Hide DC official notices
patches_modified.description: Hides official DCInside operator notices from gallery notice lists.

patches_modified.name: Hide Main Ad
patches_modified.description: Hides the main ad in the app.

patches_modified.name: Hide home components
patches_modified.description: Adds settings to hide selected DCInside home screen components.

patches_modified.name: Hide mini gallery cover image
patches_modified.description: Adds a setting to hide the mini gallery cover image above post lists.

patches_modified.name: Register settings activity
patches_modified.description: Registers the Morphe settings activity in the app manifest.

patches_modified.name: Render big DCCon as normal size
patches_modified.description: Adds a setting to render big DCCon at normal DCCon size.

patches_modified.name: Restore old post icons
patches_modified.description: Adds a setting to restore DCInside 4.7.x post list and read footer icons.

patches_modified.name: Spoof Signature
patches_modified.description: Spoofs the app signature to bypass integrity checks.

patches_added.name: Friendship status indicator
patches_added.description: Adds a follows you back status label on the profile page andshows a detailed friendship status breakdown on click

patches_removed.name: Follow back indicator
patches_removed.description: Adds a label on the profile page, indicating whether a user is follows you back.

patches_modified.name: Add settings
patches_modified.description: Adds settings to control preferences are patching

patches_modified.name: Allow user network certificate
patches_modified.description: Allows user network certificate for whitehat testing

patches_modified.name: Amoled theme
patches_modified.description: Replaces Instagram's dark-mode background greys with pure black for AMOLED displays.

patches_modified.name: Change like animation
patches_modified.description: Change the animation to one from existing Rings like animations

patches_modified.name: Change version code
patches_modified.description: Changes the version code of the app. This will turn off app store updates and allows downgrading an existing app install to an older app version.

patches_modified.name: Clone
patches_modified.description:
Changes the package name and the app name. This allows you to install the patched app alongside the original Instagram app.
Caution: Do not select the official Morphe's "Change package name" universal patch.

patches_modified.name: Copy comment
patches_modified.description: Adds a button to copy comments on posts and reels.

patches_modified.name: Customise story timestamp
patches_modified.description: Customise the timestamp that shows when the story was posted

patches_modified.name: Disable Reels scrolling
patches_modified.description: Disables the endless scrolling behavior in Instagram Reels, preventing swiping to the next Reel. Note: On a clean install, the 'Tip' animation may appear but will stop on its own after a few seconds.

patches_modified.name: Disable analytics
patches_modified.description: Block analytics that are sent to Instagram/Facebook servers.

patches_modified.name: Disable discover people
patches_modified.description: Disables discover people section on user profile

patches_modified.name: Disable double tap like
patches_modified.description: Disable double tap like on post, reel, comment and message

patches_modified.name: Disable screenshot detection
patches_modified.description: Disables screenshots detection in DM

patches_modified.name: Disable story flipping
patches_modified.description: Disable automatic flipping/moving to next story

patches_modified.name: Download media
patches_modified.description: Adds ability to download posts, reels, stories and highlights

patches_modified.name: Download voice message
patches_modified.description: Enables ability to download voice messages

patches_modified.name: External downloader
patches_modified.description: Adds support to share post links directly to external downloader

patches_modified.name: Hide group creation button on sharesheet
Hide navigation buttons
patches_modified.description: Hides navigation bar buttons, such as the Reels and Create button.

patches_modified.name: Hide notes tray
patches_modified.description: Hides notes tray in DM section

patches_modified.name: Hide reshare button
patches_modified.description: Hides the reshare button from both posts and reels.

patches_modified.name: Hide stories tray
patches_modified.description: Hides stories tray from main feed.

patches_modified.name: Hide suggested content
patches_modified.description: Hides suggested stories, reels, threads (Suggested posts will still be shown).

patches_modified.name: Improve image viewing
patches_modified.description: Fetches max resolution images from server.

patches_modified.name: Limit feed to following profiles
patches_modified.description: Filters the home feed to display only content from profiles you follow.

patches_modified.name: Make ephemeral media permanent
patches_modified.description: Changes unexpired view once, view twice media to permanent view.

patches_modified.name: More options on post
patches_modified.description: Adds an overflow menu button to get more options on post/reels, like copy description, copy username etc

patches_modified.name: More options on profile
patches_modified.description: Adds a new button to handle user related data like copy handle, download profile picture etc

patches_modified.name: Open links externally
patches_modified.description: Changes links to always open in your external browser, instead of the in-app browser.

patches_modified.name: Remove build expired popup
patches_modified.description: Removes the popup that appears after a while, when the app version ages.

patches_modified.name: Remove empty bottom space
patches_modified.description: Removes empty space below bottom navigation bar

patches_modified.name: Save media comment
patches_modified.description: Adds a button to save media comments on posts and reels.

patches_modified.name: Unlock Plus benefits
patches_modified.description: Unlocks 'Plus' subscription benefits that are checked locally. USE IT AT YOUR OWN RISK

patches_modified.name: Unlock developer options
patches_modified.description: Unlocks developer option by long pressing home icon

patches_modified.name: Unlock employee options
patches_modified.description: Unlocks all options using by employee for debugging

patches_modified.name: Validate links
patches_modified.description: Fixes app crashing issue while opening links from a different app

patches_modified.name: View story mentions
patches_modified.description: Add option to view visible and hidden story mentions.

patches_modified.name: Add ability to copy media link
Block redirecting to X Lite
patches_modified.description: Blocks redirecting to the new X Android UI on launch

patches_modified.name: Bring back twitter
patches_modified.description: Bring back old twitter logo and name

patches_modified.name: Browse tweet object
patches_modified.description: Adds an option to browse the tweet object in the share menu.

patches_modified.name: Change version code
patches_modified.description: Changes the version code of the app. This will turn off app store updates and allows downgrading an existing app install to an older app version.

patches_modified.name: Clear tracking params
patches_modified.description: Removes tracking parameters when sharing links

patches_modified.name: Control video auto scroll
patches_modified.description: Control video auto scroll in immersive view

patches_modified.name: Custom download folder
patches_modified.description: Change the download directory for video downloads

patches_modified.name: Custom emoji font
patches_modified.description: Customise emoji font style

patches_modified.name: Custom font
patches_modified.description: Customise font style

patches_modified.name: Custom sharing domain
patches_modified.description: Allows for using domains like fxtwitter when sharing tweets/posts.

patches_modified.name: Delete from database
patches_modified.description: Delete entries from database(cache)

patches_modified.name: Disable auto timeline scroll on launch
Disunify xchat system
patches_modified.description: Bring back legacy features like messages and share sheet.

patches_modified.name: Download patch
patches_modified.description: Unlocks the ability to download videos and gifs from Twitter/X

patches_modified.name: Dynamic color
patches_modified.description: Replaces the default Twitter Blue with the user's Material You palette.

patches_modified.name: Enable PiP mode automatically
patches_modified.description: Enables PiP mode when you close the app

patches_modified.name: Enable Undo Posts
patches_modified.description: Enables ability to undo posts before posting

patches_modified.name: Enable force HD videos
patches_modified.description: Videos will be played in highest quality always

patches_modified.name: Export all activities
patches_modified.description: Makes all app activities exportable.

patches_modified.name: Force enable translate
patches_modified.description: Get translate option for all posts

patches_modified.name: Handle custom twitter links
patches_modified.description: Adds support for opening custom twitter links such as vxtwitter, fxtwitter, and fixupx within the app. These will have to be manually enabled under the "Open by default" section in the app info!

patches_modified.name: Hide Banner
patches_modified.description: Hide new post banner

patches_modified.name: Hide FAB
patches_modified.description: Adds an option to hide Floating action button

patches_modified.name: Hide Recommended Users
patches_modified.description: Hide recommended users that pops up when you follow someone

patches_modified.name: Hide badges from navigation bar icons
patches_modified.description: Hides notification nudges & counts from navigation bar icons

patches_modified.name: Hide followed by context
patches_modified.description: Hides followed by context under profile

patches_modified.name: Hide immersive player
patches_modified.description: Removes swipe up for more videos in video player

patches_modified.name: Hide nudge button
patches_modified.description: Hides follow/subscribe/follow back buttons on posts

patches_modified.name: Hide post metrics
patches_modified.description: Hides like, reposts etc counts.

patches_modified.name: Hide promote button
patches_modified.description: Hides promote button under self posts

patches_modified.name: Hide recommendation items
patches_modified.description: Adds options to hide recommendation items such as "Who to follow" and "Today's news" in timeline, search, and replies.

patches_modified.name: Import/Export login token
patches_modified.description: Adds an feature to export and import the token of accounts. This is useful when logging in on your second device or when re-installing piko.

patches_modified.name: Legacy share links
patches_modified.description: Brings back username on post share links. Works post 11.4x.xx

patches_modified.name: Log server response
patches_modified.description: Log json responses received from server

patches_modified.name: Native downloader
patches_modified.description: Requires X 11.0.0-release.0 or higher.

patches_modified.name: Native reader mode
patches_modified.description: Requires X 11.0.0-release.0 or higher.

patches_modified.name: Native translator
patches_modified.description: Requires X 11.0.0-release.0 or higher.

patches_modified.name: No shortened URL
patches_modified.description: Get rid of t.co short urls.

patches_modified.name: Pause search suggestions
patches_modified.description: Search suggestions will not be saved locally

patches_modified.name: Remove Ads
patches_modified.description: Removed promoted posts, trends and google ads

patches_modified.name: Remove premium upsell
patches_modified.description: Removes premium upsell in home timeline

patches_modified.name: Remove search suggestions
patches_modified.description: Hide/Remove search suggestion in explore section

patches_modified.name: Remove view count
patches_modified.description: Removes the view count from the bottom of tweets

patches_modified.name: Round off numbers
patches_modified.description: Enable or disable rounding off numbers

patches_modified.name: Selectable Text
patches_modified.description: Makes bio and username selectable

patches_modified.name: Share Tweet as Image
patches_modified.description: Share tweets as rendered image. Requires X 11.0.0-release.0 or higher.

patches_modified.name: Show changelogs
patches_modified.description: Shows changelogs when new a patch is installed.

patches_modified.name: Show poll results
patches_modified.description: Adds an option to show poll results without voting

patches_modified.name: Show post source label
patches_modified.description: Source label will be shown only on public posts
